cumulative_event_comments:
The main trail around the central lake is closed and fenced off. The out of bounds area is marked on the map and the fencing and construction zone should be obvious. Entering into the out of bounds area will result in disqualification.
Welcome to the Winter and School League (WIOL) Series!
